response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise in full-stack development, distributed systems, and open-source contributions, with experience at top-tier tech companies like Google and Meta. However, his background lacks direct evidence of executive-level leadership in agentic AI or fintech infrastructure, particularly in regulated environments, which are critical for this CTO role.
strengths: Proven experience in distributed systems and event-driven architectures at scale (Google, Meta, Dunnhumby).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators at Google) and open-source projects.
Strong technical versatility across languages, frameworks, and domains (web, mobile, embedded, and backend).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or track record scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Limited evidence of fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, real-time risk modeling, or regulatory compliance).
Agentic AI experience appears peripheral (e.g., tooling) rather than core architecture or production deployment in high-stakes environments.
